title: Replace in [nil, ""] defensive check with assertive guards
prompt:
Given:

```
def display(name) do
  if name in [nil, ""] do
    "Anonymous"
  else
    String.upcase(name)
  end
end
```

Rewrite with two function heads — one matching `nil`, one matching `""`, one pattern-matching a non-empty binary with a `when is_binary(name)` guard. Do not use `in [nil, ""]`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Display do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Requires three-head split and an assertive guard.
